# Practice Problems of Varying Difficulties

## Difficulty vs. Understanding

This line graph displays a negative correlation between difficulty and understanding, where those who perceive the class as more difficult have more trouble understanding the material.

![Difficulty Understanding]({{ site.baseurl }}/static/imgs/Difficulty_Understanding.png)

## Prior Experience vs. Difficulty

This boxplot shows the relationship between high previous experience and low perceived diffuclty of the course work.

![Experience]({{ site.baseurl }}/static/imgs/Experience.png)

## Difficulty vs. Quiz Effectivness

This barplot details how those who perceive the class as more difficult tend to also be critical of the quizzes' effectiveness.

![Qz Effective]({{ site.baseurl }}/static/imgs/Qz_effective.png)
